articles.title: Gurgaon Metro Expansion Approved
articles.summary: Haryana government approved a major metro expansion project connecting new sectors of Gurgaon.
articles.content: The Haryana government has approved the expansion of the Gurgaon metro network to connect emerging sectors and improve connectivity. The project aims to reduce traffic congestion and provide a faster commute for residents.

articles.title: India Startup Ecosystem Hits New Record
articles.summary: Indian startups raised record investments this quarter driven by AI and fintech companies.
articles.content: India's startup ecosystem continues to grow rapidly as investors pour billions into technology companies focused on artificial intelligence, financial services and digital platforms.

articles.title: Global Markets React to AI Boom
articles.summary: Technology companies around the world are seeing major stock gains due to AI innovation.
articles.content: Global stock markets surged after several technology companies announced major artificial intelligence breakthroughs and investment plans.
